title: FINANCIAL LITERACY - 211info
text: BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER FINANCIAL LITERACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one coaching in personal finance topics, including budgeting, paying off debt, and saving for emergencies. 13565 SW Walker Road Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 10am-11am Email (503) 591-9028 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 591-9028 Care to Share Alternate (503) 591-9025 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Beaverton School District: Zip codes 97005, 97006, 97007, 97008, 97124, 97140, 97210, 97221, 97223, 97224, 97225, 97229, 97231 TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near Nike campus on Murray and Walker Road across from Barnes Elementary School. TrMet bus line 62. Services: Financial Literacy Training Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER FOOD - CARE TO SHARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NAVIGATOR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
